title: Two Sum
short: Find two numbers whose sum equals the target.
statement: Given n integers and a target value, print the 1-based indexes of any two different elements whose sum is equal to the target.
input: First line contains n and target. Second line contains n integers.
output: Print two indexes in increasing order. Print -1 if no pair exists.

title: Balanced Brackets
short: Check whether brackets are properly nested.
statement: Given a string containing only parentheses, square brackets, and curly braces, determine whether every opening bracket is closed in the correct order.
output: Print YES if the string is balanced, otherwise print NO.

title: Shortest Path
short: Compute shortest distance in an unweighted graph.
statement: Given an undirected unweighted graph and two nodes s and t, find the minimum number of edges needed to travel from s to t.
input: First line contains n, m, s, t. The next m lines contain edges u v.
output: Print the shortest distance, or -1 if t is unreachable.
